summary: Iteration 7 frontend retest of 3 fixes (download-sample-csv-btn, run-auto-bestseller-btn, alert dedup). All 3 fixes verified PASSING. Admin login → Products tab → both buttons render and are functional. /api/products/sample-csv returns 200 (text/csv, 626 bytes). Clicking run-auto-bestseller-btn shows 'Auto-bestseller rule executed' toast and admin-alerts-strip displays bestseller_low_stock alert on overview tab. After 2 consecutive clicks, only 1 unread alert exists (same id 0742087e-… returned both times) — dedup confirmed at backend.
seed_data_creation: None. Existing seed data used. Auto-bestseller rule generated 1 unread alert (bestseller_low_stock, count=2) which remains in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter6/iter7 admin fixes are stable. download-sample-csv-btn, csv-upload-btn, run-auto-bestseller-btn all present in Admin Products toolbar (Admin.jsx 279-281). Backend job_auto_bestseller dedup logic working — repeat invocations update the existing unread alert instead of creating duplicates. Token key in localStorage is 'mc_token'.

fix2.alert_text: 2 bestseller(s) marked as 'Few units left'. Restock recommended.
